nodes.label: Metamodel Controller - Manage MDE (Model-Driven Engineering) metamodels

Validate metamodel update         - Check authorization (only author can update)
Validate metamodel deletion         - Check if exists         - Check authorizat
Metamodels are not synced from GitHub

Get all metamodels with optional filters          - **status**: Filter by status
